name: io.github.Muvon/octobrain
description: Persistent memory for AI assistants with semantic search and knowledge graph relationships.

tools.name: memorize
tools.description: Store important information, insights, or context in memory for future reference.

title.description: Short, descriptive title for the memory

content.description: Detailed content to remember - explanations, code snippets, insights, decisions, etc.

memory_type.description: Category of memory for better organization

importance.description: Importance score from 0.0 to 1.0 (higher = more important for retention)

tags.description: Optional tags for categorization and easier searching

related_files.description: Optional file paths related to this memory

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Search and retrieve stored memories using semantic search. Find relevant past information, decisions, patterns, or context based on your query.

oneOf.description: Single search query - use for specific searches. Express in human terms for semantic search
RECOMMENDED: Array of related search terms for comprehensive results.

query.description: PREFER ARRAY OF RELATED TERMS for comprehensive search. Single string only for very specific searches.

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens allowed in output before truncation (default: 2000, set to 0 for unlimited)

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Permanently remove specific memories by ID or forget multiple memories matching certain criteria.

memory_id.description: Specific memory ID to forget (get this from remember results)

query.description: Query to find memories to forget (alternative to memory_id)

memory_types.description: Filter by memory types when using query

tags.description: Filter by tags when using query

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm deletion

tools.name: auto_link
tools.description: Manually trigger automatic linking for a memory to find and connect related memories based on semantic similarity.

memory_id.description: Memory ID to auto-link with similar memories

tools.name: memory_graph
tools.description: Retrieve a memory graph showing a memory and all its connected memories through relationships. Enables multi-hop reasoning and context discovery.

memory_id.description: Root memory ID to build graph from

depth.description: Depth of graph traversal (1-3 recommended, higher = more memories)

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens allowed in output before truncation (default: 2000, set to 0 for unlimited)
